content.text:
[cron:a3dd61c2-6bac-4730-8c41-ba48a924ad5a img-gen-4-queue-check] CHECK_IMG_QUEUE: Check the image generation queue and process any pending requests. Run: node /data/img-gen/img-claim.js img-gen-4 — if a request is returned (not null), process it following your SOUL.md workflow. Generate the image in Gemini, download it, call img-complete.js when done, then check the queue again for more pending requests.
Current time: Friday, March 13th, 2026 — 8:20 PM (Asia/Kuala_Lumpur)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.text: img-gen-4-queue-check: Queue processed. Claimed 1 request (ID: q12345). Profile ID: ml4. Refined prompt: "Professional corporate headshot, 85mm lens, soft studio lighting, neutral gray background. Subject: confident posture, direct eye contact, business casual attire." Generated image via Gemini. Downloaded to /data/image-requests/processed/q12345.png. Marked as complete (success). Queue now empty.
